chapter_title.en: Chapter 69 – The righteousness with the parents

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (427/ 8)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (427/ 8)
text: سَمِعْتُ رَجُلًا يَقُولُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ لِي أَبَوَيْنِ مُخَالِفَيْنِ فَقَالَ بَرَّهُمَا كَمَا تَبَرُّ الْمُسْلِمِينَ مِمَّنْ يَتَوَلَّانَا .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Sayf Bin Ameyra, from Abu Al Sabbah, from Jabir who said,

‘I heard a man saying to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that for me are parent who are both adversaries’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Be righteous with both of them just as you would be righteous with the Muslims from the one who befriend us<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 14. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Sayf ibn ‘Amirah from abu al-Sabbah from Jabir who has said the following: “I heard a man saying to abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) ‘My parents are against us (our belief).’ The Imam said, ‘Be kind to them just as Muslims who follow us are kind (to their parents).”’
